analysis: The project appears to be a static website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs) and a focus on black holes as the theme. The CSS files are incomplete and need to be updated to reflect a cosmic, dark theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML files need to be completed with interactive sections related to black holes, and the JavaScript files need to be fixed for syntax errors and enhanced with interactive functionality.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Fix the syntax error in the listFiles function by correcting the string quotes for the downloadUrl path.
